summary.romanian_executive: Proiect Django + Tailwind pentru site partid politic — membrii, proiecte, donatii. Baza exista; product hardening si functionalitati avansate lipsesc.
summary.italian_short: Progetto Django per un partito politico italiano. Backend, admin, modelli e frontend Tailwind. Mancano alcune configurazioni di produzione.
summary.english_short: Django + Tailwind proof-of-concept for a political party site. Core models and admin present; production and advanced features pending.

critical_issues: whitenoise present in requirements but not configured in settings.py
DATABASE_URL is not parsed in settings.py despite .env.example and psycopg2 in requirements
next_steps: Fix middleware and add whitenoise config
Add DATABASE_URL support or document SQLite-only
Wire frontend forms to backend endpoints
